expectedBehavior: Classifies the goal as the cover intent category
Routes to /ork:cover with a target of 90 percent
Confirms the chosen route with the user before handing off
Does not perform the coverage work itself; the router only classifies and dispatches
Classifies the goal as the optimize intent category from the metric and direction
Routes to a /goal optimization loop rather than a dedicated experiment skill
States plainly that OrchestKit has no /ork:experiment skill and uses a /goal loop instead
Confirms the route before handing off

expectedBehavior: Does NOT invoke the auto router or treat it as a development goal
The router is only for routing development goals to OrchestKit skills, not general queries
Recognizes the goal is too ambiguous to classify confidently

Does not hand off to a specialist skill until the intent is clarified
